instruction: The thin black frame circle on the wallet icon has slipped out of place. Move it back to its original position. (very subtle — only 2px off).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/wallet.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H15a3 3 0 1 1-6 0H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 12m18 0v6a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 18v-6m18 0V9M3 12V9m18 0a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 9m18 0V6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 6v3"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="66" cy="66" r="60" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/wallet.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H15a3 3 0 1 1-6 0H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 12m18 0v6a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-2.25 2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 1 3 18v-6m18 0V9M3 12V9m18 0a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 9m18 0V6a2.25 2.25 0 0 0-2.25-2.25H5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0 0 3 6v3"/></g>
  <circle id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" cx="64" cy="64" r="60" />
</svg>
